title: Exile Overlay
description: An add-on for Mine and Slash that replaces the default HUD with an ARPG-style interface.
body: ![Game screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d68c17b2dcf03310b4ad8c1523eb9282fcb669c_0.webp) A customizable HUD overlay mod for Minecraft. Currently designed for Mine and Slash integration only. --- **Features** * Orb Resource Display - HP/Mana/Stamina displayed in beautiful orb UI * Skill Hotbar - Customizeable hotbar for managing MOD skills * Damage Popup - Custom font damage display color-coded by Mine and Slash elements * Buff/Debuff Display - List current effects with icons * Target Info Display - Display target HP and Mine and Slash level * Day Counter - Display world elapsed days * Armor Durability - Display equipped armor durability --- **Configuration** * Press `O` (default) to open HUD configuration --- **Requirements** * Minecraft 1.20.1 * **[Mine and Slash](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-and-slash)** (Required - currently only supports Mine and Slash) * Forge 47+ (Forge) * Java 17
